headline: Franklin Resources (BEN) Valuation Check After Weak Jobs Data And Rising Middle East Tensions
summary: Franklin Resources (BEN) has been under pressure as investors react to a weak February jobs report and rising geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, both of which have weighed on financial stocks. See our latest analysis for Franklin Resources. At a share price of $25.78, Franklin Resources has seen a 1-day share price return of a 1.75% decline and a 7-day share price return of a 4.52% decline. Its 1-year total shareholder return of 36.38% reflects momentum that has held up over a longer...
